prompt: Create a vertical cinematic portrait of a young Chinese woman in an ancient snowy night setting, standing in a soft over-the-shoulder pose and looking back toward the camera. She wears a pale ivory traditional Hanfu cloak with thick white fur trim around the collar and sleeve edges, subtle floral embroidery on the wide sleeve, and a muted light green skirt visible underneath. Her long black hair is styled into exactly two thick braids, one on each side, with a small pale pink floral hair ornament near the right side of her head. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered smooth skin-toned rectangular block with no facial features, covering the entire face area. Behind her is a large multi-tier Chinese temple or palace with ornate upturned roofs, warmly glowing golden lanterns and windows, heavily blurred by shallow depth of field. The scene takes place at night with dense falling snow, visible snow streaks and flakes across the foreground, snow resting on rooflines and railings, and a stone bridge or terrace railing at the bottom. Use dramatic warm backlighting from behind her head and shoulders, creating a glowing rim light on her hair and fur, with strong contrast between the warm temple lights and the cold dark snowy sky. Style: ultra-realistic, cinematic photography, 9:16 vertical composition, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, atmospheric snowfall, warm amber and cool black color palette, high detail fabric texture, no text, no watermark. Customize the subject as young Chinese woman, the outfit color as pale ivory, the background landmark as multi-tier Chinese temple, the weather as dense falling snow, and the lighting mood as warm golden backlight at snowy night.
